proposals.reason: This week's only material EU development: the European Parliament adopted the AI Act Digital Omnibus on 16 Jun 2026 (423-57-174); Council formal adoption expected 29 Jun, then OJEU. Adds the procedural milestone that triggers the deferred high-risk dates.

card.t: AI Act Digital Omnibus: Council Adoption Expected
card.x: European Parliament adopted the Digital Omnibus on 16 Jun 2026 (423-57-174). Council formal adoption expected 29 Jun, then publication in the Official Journal (OJEU). Confirms deferral of high-risk dates to 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III standalone) and 2 Aug 2028 (Annex I, including medical devices), and adds a new Article 5 prohibition on non-consensual intimate-image generators. Until OJEU publication, the original AI Act timeline remains the legally applicable baseline.

proposals.reason: The deferred Annex I / medical-devices date is now near-confirmed after the 16 Jun Parliament adoption and the expected 29 Jun Council adoption; update the description to reflect the procedural status and soften 'if delayed' to 'deferred'.

card.t: AI Act Annex I / Medical Devices (Deferred)
card.x: Deferred application date for AI systems under EU harmonisation legislation, including medical devices (Annex I). Near-confirmed: Parliament adopted the Digital Omnibus on 16 Jun 2026; Council formal adoption expected 29 Jun, then OJEU publication. Legally effective only once published in the Official Journal.

proposals.reason: The deferred Annex III standalone date is now near-confirmed after the 16 Jun Parliament adoption; update the description to reflect the procedural status and soften 'if delayed' to 'deferred'.

card.x: Deferred application date for standalone high-risk AI systems in Annex III under the Digital Omnibus. Near-confirmed: Parliament adopted on 16 Jun 2026; Council adoption expected 29 Jun, then OJEU publication.
